description: Private accounts, or the amount owed to someone by the people mentioned in the document or the amount of money the person collected from the people mentioned. Every entry begins with "عند" followed by a name (including at least two women, Ḥusn al-Māshiṭa and Ḥusna the wife of Zayd, and amount of money in dirhams.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בJRL.
